metadata.name: Apply a Travel Voucher to a New Booking

description: A customer is booking a new flight and wants to pay for it using a travel voucher from a previous cancellation.

nodes.task_description: During the booking process, ask the customer for their travel voucher code.
Validate the voucher code and retrieve its remaining balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the voucher is valid and has a sufficient balance to cover the new flight.

nodes.task_description: Apply the voucher as payment for the new booking and issue the ticket.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully completes the booking using the voucher.
